findings.title: Add Notification Priority Levels
findings.description: Implement a three-tier notification priority system (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
assumptions: Users will benefit from visual differentiation of notification urgency.

evidence.excerpt: Users need a way to distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are categorized by priority THEN the user can see visual indicators for urgent, normal, and low notifications.

findings.title: Fix Mobile Notification Delivery Issues
findings.description: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for users on Android 14 to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: Users will re-enable notification permissions after OS updates.

evidence.excerpt: Several users on Android 14 report that push notifications silently fail.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN they receive a push notification THEN the notification should be delivered without failure.

findings.title: Implement Granular Notification Preferences
findings.description: Allow admins to configure notification preferences at a granular level, enabling defaults per team and individual overrides.
assumptions: Admins need flexibility in managing notifications.

evidence.excerpt: Admins require the ability to configure notification preferences at a granular level.

recommendations: Create a user interface for preference settings

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an admin accesses the notification settings WHEN they configure preferences THEN the settings should apply to the specified teams or users.

findings.title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
findings.description: Create a settings page where users can opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, social, transactional).
assumptions: Users want control over the types of notifications they receive.

evidence.excerpt: Users should be able to opt in/out of specific notification categories.

recommendations: Develop a React component for settings

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification settings page WHEN they select categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

findings.title: Implement ML-based Notification Batching
findings.description: Batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns.
assumptions: Users prefer receiving notifications in batches rather than individually.
recommendations: Develop ML model for user engagement patterns

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model determines optimal timing THEN the notifications should be batched and delivered accordingly.

findings.title: Reduce Notification Delivery Latency
findings.description: Improve notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms by optimizing the delivery pipeline.

evidence.excerpt: Reduce notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms.

recommendations: Implement async writes and batch inserts

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the p95 delivery latency should be under 200ms.

findings.title: Enhance Accessibility Features in Notification Center
findings.description: Improve accessibility in the notification center for users with disabilities, addressing color-only priority indicators.
assumptions: Users with disabilities need better navigation options.

evidence.excerpt: Users with disabilities face challenges navigating the notification center.

recommendations: Test with users who have disabilities

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with disabilities accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate THEN they should be able to identify notifications without relying solely on color.

findings.title: Conduct A/B Testing on Notification Content
findings.description: Perform A/B testing on different notification content styles to determine which formats yield higher CTR and lower unsubscribe rates.
assumptions: Different content styles will affect user engagement.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct A/B testing on different notification content styles.

recommendations: Analyze results to inform content strategy

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification content styles are tested WHEN users interact with notifications THEN the CTR and unsubscribe rates should be measured and compared.

findings.title: Gather User Feedback on Notification Preferences
findings.description: Collect user feedback on notification preferences to inform future enhancements and ML model training.
assumptions: User feedback will provide insights for improvements.

evidence.excerpt: There is insufficient data on user preferences regarding notification timing and content.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a feedback collection mechanism is in place WHEN users provide feedback THEN the data should be stored for analysis.

findings.title: Monitor Notification Delivery Performance
findings.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics to ensure compliance with SLAs.
assumptions: Monitoring will help maintain performance standards.

evidence.excerpt: The 95th Percentile Delivery Latency measures the time taken to deliver notifications.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger if thresholds are exceeded.

findings.title: Document Compliance for Notification Features
findings.description: Create compliance documentation for notification features to ensure adherence to legal and accessibility standards.
assumptions: Compliance documentation is necessary for legal adherence.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in source.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN notification features are implemented WHEN compliance documentation is created THEN it should meet legal and accessibility standards.

summary: The analysis of customer insights and metrics has led to the identification of 12 structured requirements for the SmartNotify product. These requirements focus on enhancing notification prioritization, fixing critical delivery issues, improving user preferences, and ensuring compliance and accessibility. Each requirement is detailed with acceptance criteria, priorities, complexities, and phases to guide the development process.
